summary: Completed backend testing for new chat features (Block, Mute, Archive, Star, Nickname) and content APIs (Gaming, Marketplace, Watch). Fixed critical async/await bugs in watch.py and marketplace.py that were causing 500 errors.

passed_tests: Backend: /api/chat/mute - Mute conversation for 8 hours (with expiry)
Backend: /api/chat/mute - Mute conversation for 1 week (with expiry)
Backend: /api/chat/nickname - Set nickname for valid conversation
Backend: /api/gaming/discover - Returns games list with mock data
Backend: /api/gaming/streams - Returns streams list with mock data
Backend: /api/marketplace/listings - Returns listings list (empty is valid)
Backend: /api/watch/feed - Returns videos list (empty is valid)
Backend: Auth - Test user login/register works
critical_code_review_comments: watch.py and marketplace.py were using synchronous MongoDB calls (list(), find_one(), etc.) in async functions - this caused 500 errors
All MongoDB operations in async functions must use await with motor's async methods
Use .to_list(limit) instead of list() for async cursor operations
All chat features endpoints (Block, Mute, Archive, Star, Nickname) properly implemented with correct async/await patterns

test_credentials.note: Test users are created dynamically with TEST_ prefix for each test

seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - tests create their own test users with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new chat feature APIs (Block, Mute, Archive, Star, Nickname) are fully functional. Fixed async bugs in watch.py and marketplace.py - these files were missing async/await keywords for MongoDB operations. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_chat_features_api.py contains 39 comprehensive tests for chat features, gaming, marketplace, and watch APIs. All APIs return proper 401 for invalid tokens.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: watch.py and marketplace.py used synchronous MongoDB operations (list(), find_one(), insert_one(), update_one(), delete_one()) in async route handlers with motor's AsyncIOMotorClient
rca_of_the_issue.reproduction: Call any endpoint in /api/watch/ or /api/marketplace/listings - they all returned 500 Internal Server Error with TypeError: 'AsyncIOMotorCursor' object is not iterable
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Added 'await' keyword to all MongoDB operations and replaced list() calls with .to_list(limit) for cursor operations
